title: Beechcraft 36 Bonanza
description: "Lady Ingrid" is a meticulously maintained 1988 Beechcraft Bonanza A36 that combines a prestigious three-owner history with the rigorous oversight of
description_full: "Lady Ingrid" is a meticulously maintained 1988 Beechcraft Bonanza A36 that combines a prestigious three-owner history with the rigorous oversight of
avionics_notes: G500, GTN750, WAAS, ADS-B, GARMIN, AUTOPILOT
airframe_notes:
Meet “Lady Ingrid,” a stunning 1988 Beechcraft Bonanza A36 that perfectly marries classic pedigree with modern innovation. Maintained under strict EASA CAMO control and having had only three owners since new, this aircraft offers a rare level of documented care and mechanical integrity.
Performance is at the forefront, featuring an overhauled engine and propeller with only 215 hours of flight time. “Lady Ingrid” is optimized for efficiency and comfort, equipped with GAMIjectors for precision fuel flow and a lower-noise propeller that grants access to quieter category airports.
The flight deck has been completely transformed with a full avionics upgrade, featuring the latest gadgets for 21st-century situational awareness. Complemented by full external LED lighting, this aircraft is a premier, turnkey choice for the pilot who seeks the legendary Bonanza experience without compromise.
Note of the Sellers: With pain in our hearts, we have to let go of our beloved “Lady Ingrid”. This due to not being able to fly a decent amount of hours during the years! Tight commercial schedules and other things are keeping us from flying. Therefore we are selling our “Lady Ingrid” (the plane, not my mom or my fathers wife ;-))
Highlights
EASA registered and CAMO controlled
Always hangered
All logs present since date of manufacturer
Overhauled engine and propeller
Synthetic Vision
Terrain warning
Safe Taxi
ADS-B Out / In
WAAS, PRNAV, LPV and RNP Equipped
Flightstream 510
Certified engine indication system (EIS)
LEMO connectors installed at pilot seats
USB-A and USB-C Ports
CIES Fuel senders
GAMIjectors fuel injectors and fine wired spark plugs
Rosen sunvisors
Type: Beech Bonanza A36
Registration: D-EKLB
Serial Number: E-2444
Year of Manufacture: 1988
Total Time: 2,107 hours
Don’t miss your chance to own the ultimate A36! Contact us to schedule your viewing at sales@faaircraftsales.com or at +31 (0)15 820 0999.
ENGINES
Engine type: Continental IO-550-B
Total Time: 215 hours since overha
